# StadiumPilot AI Agentic API

This file provides context for LLMs to understand the site.

## Endpoints
- /api/stadium: Get live stadium conditions.
- /api/digest: Get predictive AI operations digest.
- /api/route: Post start/destination to get optimal paths.

[Frontend Source](https://github.com/example/stadiumpilot-frontend)
[Backend Source](https://github.com/example/stadiumpilot-backend)
